**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Xinguangyuan Technology Industrial Co., Ltd. is a legacy international trading firm operating under the guise of a technology and manufacturing entity. Established in 2004, its historical name, 'Jiangsu Xinguangyuan International Trade Co., Ltd.', perfectly encapsulates its true operational nature. Despite being officially misclassified under 'Electronic Device Manufacturing' and holding an 18 million RMB paid-in capital, the company reported 0 insured employees in 2024. A zero-headcount operation situated in a single building (Building 1) within an industrial park is structurally incapable of hardware manufacturing. Its business scope further confirms its asset-light status, emphasizing the 'sales' of automobiles, auto parts, and IT products, alongside domestic trade and advertising design. It currently functions as a dormant or low-activity trading shell, likely utilized for import/export billing or retaining industrial park real estate.
